name: persona-theorist-compose
note: S-COMPOSE-CALM slice 1, level-adaptive defaults (interview: 'a maestro lands on dense chips without configuring it'). Advanced: the empty-state starter cards are NOISE - suppressed; the dense collapsed chord chips (S-CHORD-COLLAPSE) are the landing. Red-first: pre-fix shows starters to every level.

steps.label: advanced emphasis: NO starter cards in the empty state (dense landing)
